js.category: [{"text":"最新发布","id":"/"},{"text":"网红黑料","id":"/category/whhl/"},{"text":"吃瓜视频","id":"/category/cgsp/"}]
js.home: async(p,c)=>{const u=c==='/'?`https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/page/${p}/`:`https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net${c}page/${p}/`;const r=await fetch(u,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'}});const h=await r.text();const i=[];const g=/<article.*?href="(.*?)".*?title="(.*?)".*?data-src="(.*?)".*?<\/article>/gs;let m;while((m=g.exec(h))!==null){i.push({id:m[1],title:m[2],cover:m[3],remark:'点击播放'})}return i}
js.search: async(k,p)=>{const u=`https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/search/${encodeURIComponent(k)}/${p}/`;const r=await fetch(u,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'}});const h=await r.text();const i=[];const g=/<article.*?href="(.*?)".*?title="(.*?)".*?data-src="(.*?)".*?<\/article>/gs;let m;while((m=g.exec(h))!==null){i.push({id:m[1],title:m[2],cover:m[3]}) }return i}
